subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested Himself through a letter from amongst the letters of His transcendent Oneness in the realm of eternity, whereupon the Temples of the Cause appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بحرف من حروفات عز احدیة فی عالم البقاء اذا ظهرت هیاکل الامر
